payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped black glossy recessed fireplace with a reflective glass front set into a beige wall; glass shows lamp glare and faint vertical-slat/radiator reflections, top edge appears irregular or covered, and the visible portion suggests a medium-wide unit roughly at typical living-room height — approximately 2.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"fireplace","short_description":"black glossy recessed fireplace partial","long_description":"Partial, edge-cropped black glossy recessed fireplace with a reflective glass front set into a beige wall; glass shows lamp glare and faint vertical-slat/radiator reflections, top edge appears irregular or covered, and the visible portion suggests a medium-wide unit roughly at typical living-room height — approximately 2.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["black glossy glass front","recessed into beige wall","reflective with lamp glare","faint vertical-slat/radiator reflection","top edge irregular/covered","partial/edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.5}
